summary: Frontend-only verification of Phase-1 wiring (8 review flows). 5 of 8 flows fully pass. 3 flows show inline/UX issues that need main agent attention: (a) AI Visibility 'Run new scan' button does not change its label to 'Scanning...' after click, (b) Article generation does not surface a [data-testid=generation-status] element after clicking generate, (c) /reset-password?token=invalid_xxx never enters the [data-testid=reset-token-invalid] state. Additionally, the AppErrorListener IS mounting and rendering toasts (visible 'Offline' toast after dispatching a fake network CustomEvent on the homepage), but the toasts do NOT carry the required data-testid attributes [global-error-5xx | global-error-network] on a queryable node. SignUp + Onboarding + Admin API keys + Forgot/Reset-mismatch + duplicate-email inline error all pass cleanly against the live backend at api.seojalwa.com.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid=run-scan-btn] does not change the button label to 'Scanning...' / 'Queued...' (text remains 'Run new scan'). Polling may be working under the hood, but the user gets no visual feedback that a scan was queued. Confirm aiVisibilityApi.scan response sets a local state that re-renders the button label.

After clicking [data-testid=generate-article-btn] (with a brief filled in <textarea>), no element with [data-testid=generation-status] appears within 3s. Either the polling state isn't entering 'queued/in_progress' visibility, or the testid is on a wrapper that's conditionally hidden. Review request expects 'Status: queued/in_progress' below the button.

Visiting /reset-password?token=invalid_xxx does NOT render the [data-testid=reset-token-invalid] state — the standard 'Choose a new password' form is shown instead. Page likely doesn't validate the token on mount (or backend returns a code that isn't mapped to TOKEN_EXPIRED/INVALID_TOKEN). Per spec the invalid-token state should appear immediately on page load when token is bogus.

When window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('jalwa:api-error', {detail:{kind:'network'}})) is fired, a visible 'Offline' toast renders (proving the listener mounts and reacts), but no DOM node matches [data-testid=global-error-network] or [data-testid=global-error-5xx]. The data-testid must be placed on the toast root (or innermost description) so tests can assert it. Currently un-testable.

integration_issues.issue: Submitting an empty signup form shows email + password field errors (422 from backend) but the [data-testid=signup-name-error] does NOT render. Backend appears to not require fullName (or the validation locator path doesn't map to 'fullName' -> 'name'). If product wants name to be required, add a client-side required check OR ensure backend returns a name/fullName validation detail.

integration_issues.flow: FLOW 3 — WordPress Connect modal w/ no site
integration_issues.issue: Could not locate a primary 'Connect WordPress' / wp-connect open trigger on /dashboard/connections. SiteSwitcher's [data-testid=site-switcher-empty] is present but [data-testid=add-site-submit] only renders after expanding the inline add-site form — automation could not surface it without a deterministic open trigger. Recommend adding a [data-testid=site-switcher-add-open] (or similar) so the 'Add site' UI can be opened deterministically by tests. WP modal flow (step 1→2→3, verifyConnection error banner data-testid=wp-verify-error) was therefore NOT verifiable end-to-end this run.

issues: Recharts repeatedly logs 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' warnings on first paint. Container width 100% but parent has 0px during initial render. Add minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer or wait for layout — currently noisy in console (>8 warnings per dashboard load).

action_items: PulsePage.jsx: re-derive button label from local scanning state (loading/queued) so [data-testid=run-scan-btn] shows 'Scanning...' / 'Queued...' immediately after click.
WritePage.jsx: ensure the polling status text wrapper carries [data-testid=generation-status] and is mounted as soon as articlesApi.generate returns a job id (not gated on first poll response).

ResetPasswordPage.jsx: on mount, when token is present, either call backend to validate OR run length/format heuristic. Currently /reset-password?token=invalid_xxx renders the password-update form instead of [data-testid=reset-token-invalid]. Backend may need a GET /api/auth/reset-password/validate?token=... endpoint, or the existing POST handler's error code must map to tokenInvalid state on page mount.

AppErrorListener.jsx: add data-testid='global-error-5xx' / 'global-error-network' / 'global-error-403' / 'global-error-429' to the actual rendered toast DOM (currently 'Offline' toast is visible but not queryable by testid).
SignupPage.jsx: either client-side require fullName (so [data-testid=signup-name-error] shows on empty submit) OR document that name is optional. Currently 422 returns email+password errors only.
Dashboard pages: silence Recharts width(-1) warning by giving ResponsiveContainer a minHeight or by avoiding render until measured.
critical_code_review_comments: WordPressConnectModal flow has no deterministic open trigger from /dashboard/connections (no [data-testid=wp-connect-open] surfaced). Add a single testid to the primary 'Connect WordPress' card/button so tests can open the modal without DOM scraping.

AppErrorListener mounts inside SiteProvider but the toast's data-testid is on an inner node that Playwright querySelector cannot reach via the documented [data-testid=global-error-*]. Either place the testid on the toast root, or expose it via a portal-friendly attribute.
Two prior iterations (1 & 5) already flagged sparkline width(-1) warning — still unresolved.
/reset-password page does not eagerly validate the token on mount; user can fill the form and only discover token invalidity after submit. Pre-validate or show inline state immediately.

success_rate.frontend: 5/8 flows PASS, 3 flows have UI/state bugs to fix

test_credentials: Created fresh signup test_<ts>@jalwa.com / TestPassword123! per run. Admin jalwa/jalwaisadmin works.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 fresh end-user per playwright run (e.g. test_1779190577@jalwa.com). No cleanup performed — backend is live (api.seojalwa.com) and may accumulate test_*@jalwa.com users over time.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flows 1, 2, 6 (mismatch + generic-success), 7 fully pass. To retest Flows 3/4/5/8 after fixes: (a) FLOW 3 — needs an opener data-testid for WP modal; once added, expand SiteSwitcher → submit add-site, then click wp-connect → step 1→2→3 → wp-test-connect → assert wp-verify-error inline banner. (b) FLOW 4 — assert run-scan-btn inner text becomes 'Scanning...' or 'Queued...' within 2s of click. (c) FLOW 5 — assert generation-status element exists within 3s after generate-article-btn click. (d) FLOW 6 — assert reset-token-invalid renders immediately on /reset-password?token=invalid_xxx (no submit needed). (e) FLOW 8 — assert global-error-5xx / global-error-network testids exist on toast root after dispatching window CustomEvent('jalwa:api-error', {detail:{kind:'5xx'|'network'}}).
rca_of_the_issues: 1) Run-scan button label: most likely the scanning state setter is awaited AFTER the network call returns and the response handler short-circuits on the immediate response, never flipping `isScanning=true` between click and response. 2) generation-status missing: the conditional that renders the status row likely checks `jobStatus !== null` but jobStatus is only set inside the first setTimeout poll tick (3s later) — it should be set synchronously to 'queued' the moment articlesApi.generate resolves. 3) reset-token-invalid missing: ResetPasswordPage does not call a validate-on-mount endpoint and only flips tokenInvalid after a user-initiated POST. 4) global-error testids missing: AppErrorListener probably calls toast() from sonner with a description JSX containing the testid, but sonner wraps the description in an inner span and the role='status' root has no data-testid. Add the testid on the outermost toast container.
